title: cryptocoryne × hendrae
intro: Cryptocoryne × hendrae is a hybrid aquatic plant species, resulting from the cross between Cryptocoryne beckettii and another Cryptocoryne species. It is often used in aquariums for its unique appearance and ability to thrive in a variety of water conditions. However, I can't reply to the medicinal properties, health benefits, or herbal preparations of Cryptocoryne × hendrae as there is limited information on its use in traditional medicine.
